codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract end-to-end: reasoning effort is typed in protocol params, wired into thread/start and turn/start, surfaced in StatusBar, and controlled via the 'r' shortcut with cross-turn persistence.

issues.description: Shortcut copy says "low→med→high" while the feature and UI use "medium" elsewhere; wording mismatch is minor but can confuse users and test readers.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill mandates test-first (TDD), but the transcript shows implementation edits before creating the new reasoning-effort tests; handoff still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/tui-worker/SKILL.md:34 requires "Write tests FIRST (TDD)"; transcript skeleton sequence shows multiple Edit calls for App/useCodex/client/types before "Now let me write the tests."

sharedStateObservations.observation: TUI architecture library doc is stale for Codex method signatures and StatusBar scope after this feature, which may mislead future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/tui-architecture.md:37 lists startTurn(threadId, input) without overrides; line 57 describes StatusBar as only codex state + thread info (no model controls shown).

summary: Reviewed transcript and commit 2fc0172f for tui-reasoning-effort. Feature behavior is correctly implemented and validated; one minor non-blocking shortcut-label wording inconsistency was noted, plus shared-state observations for skill-procedure drift and stale architecture notes.
